linkedin.text: "We brought 800 people to a city none of them had been to, and not one thing went wrong. The transfers, the dinners, the surprise night out — it all just happened. image_prompt: Elevated wide shot from behind a vast crowd of thousands seated at a gala dinner inside a grand historic hall, tiny faces turned toward a softly lit stage area, ornate ceiling and chandeliers above, the sea of round tables with white linens and candle glow stretching far into the depth of the room.
